name: Roza Russkikh
values: Driven to improve people's lives through technology
Believes in kindness and compassionate work culture
Passionate about products that make a positive impact on the world — not just growth metrics
mission: Looking for roles where the product genuinely helps people or improves the world. Drawn to mission-driven companies in healthcare, education, climate, social impact, or any domain where the work matters beyond the bottom line.
background_story: My path to engineering is non-linear — I started as a teacher and editor, moved into QA, then transitioned into full-stack and AI development. This journey gives me a rare combination: deep empathy for users, a quality-first mindset from testing, and strong technical skills. I understand how products are built AND how real people use them.
cultural_note: International background spanning 4 countries makes me adaptable, culturally aware, and comfortable in diverse and distributed teams.
personal_facts: Parent — I value sustainable pace, psychological safety, and companies that respect the whole person
Immigrant — I know what it means to start over, adapt fast, and build from scratch
strengths_beyond_resume: Strong communicator shaped by years of teaching, editing, testing — comfortable with both technical and non-technical audiences
Empathy-driven approach to building — I think about the end user constantly
Comfortable with ambiguity — non-linear career taught me to figure things out
Naturally curious — I learn new tools by building real things with them
Genuinely excited about AI and actively use it to improve my own productivity and problem-solving
Strong analytical mindset shaped by years of QA and debugging
I take ownership and follow problems through to resolution — I don't let things fall through the cracks
Adapt quickly to new stacks, workflows, and ways of working
